StorageEngineEvents.Query:
SET DC_KIND="DENSE";
SELECT
    'DimTeam'[Time],
    SUM ( 'FactTeamMatch'[points] ),
    SUM (  ( PFDATAID ( 'FactTeamMatch'[ball_possession] ) <> 2 )  ),
    COUNT (  ),
    SUM ( 'FactTeamMatch'[total_shots] )
FROM 'FactTeamMatch'
    LEFT OUTER JOIN 'DimScope'
        ON 'FactTeamMatch'[scope_key]='DimScope'[scope_key]
    LEFT OUTER JOIN 'DimTeam'
        ON 'FactTeamMatch'[team_sk]='DimTeam'[team_sk]
WHERE
    'DimScope'[provider] = 'sportmonks' VAND
    'DimScope'[competition_key] = 'la_liga' VAND
    'DimScope'[season_label] = '2024_25';

CommandText:
EVALUATE
TOPN (
    20,
    SUMMARIZECOLUMNS (
        DimTeam[Time],
        TREATAS ( { "sportmonks" }, DimScope[provider] ),
        TREATAS ( { "la_liga" }, DimScope[competition_key] ),
        TREATAS ( { "2024_25" }, DimScope[season_label] ),
        "Jogos", [Jogos do Time],
        "Pontos", [Pontos],
        "PPG", [PPG],
        "PPG_5", [PPG Últimos 5],
        "Conversao", [Conversão de Finalizações %],
        "Cobertura", [Cobertura Estatísticas de Time %]
    ),
    [Pontos], DESC,
    DimTeam[Time], ASC
)
